unchanged_nonfloor.q: As you move the multimeter leads from one bulb terminal to the next, what does it mean when the voltage reading jumps from 0 to 1.5?
unchanged_nonfloor.orig: Bulb was damanged when reading was zero, if the reading moves to 1.5, it means you are now at a point in the circuit or path in which there is no gap and the voltage reading is giving the difference in electrical state of the battery
unchanged_nonfloor.pert: It is not true that bulb was damanged when reading was zero, if the reading moves to 1.5, it means you are now at a point in the circuit or path in which there is no gap and the voltage reading is giving the difference in electrical state of the battery
